title: Manage source control
summary: Use GitHub to build a modern source control strategy and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

sections.title: Manage source control
sections.summary: Use GitHub to build a modern source control strategy and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

lessons.title: Introduction to GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use key GitHub features, including issues, notifications, branches, commits, and pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Migrate your repository by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn to move your existing project to GitHub from a legacy version control system.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-repository-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate your repository by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Upload your project by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn to upload your existing project to GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/upload-project-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Upload your project by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Manage repository changes by using pull requests on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to manage changes to your repository source by using pull requests.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-changes-pull-requests-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage repository changes by using pull requests on GitHub

lessons.title: Settle competing commits by using merge conflict resolution on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to settle overlapping commits across branches by using merge conflict resolution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/resolve-merge-conflicts-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Settle competing commits by using merge conflict resolution on GitHub

lessons.title: Search and organize repository history by using GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to search and organize repository history by using filters, blame, and cross-linking on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/search-organize-repository-history-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Search and organize repository history by using GitHub

lessons.title: Manage an InnerSource program by using GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to manage a successful InnerSource program on GitHub through effective discoverability, guidance, and maintenance.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-innersource-program-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage an InnerSource program by using GitHub

lessons.title: Communicate effectively on GitHub using Markdown
lessons.content_md:
Learn to use Markdown to communicate with brevity, clarity, and expression.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/communicate-using-markdown/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Communicate effectively on GitHub using Markdown

lessons.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices
lessons.content_md:
Learn best practices for building, hosting, and maintaining a secure repository on GitHub.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/maintain-secure-repository-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Maintain a secure repository by using GitHub best practices

lessons.title: Automate DevOps processes by using GitHub Apps
lessons.content_md:
Learn to automate DevOps processes by using GitHub Apps that handle repetitive tasks, enforce team policies, and maintain a tidy repository.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/automate-devops-github-apps/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Automate DevOps processes by using GitHub Apps

lessons.title: Automate GitHub by using GitHub Script
lessons.content_md:
Learn to interact with the GitHub API from GitHub Actions by using GitHub Script.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/automate-github-using-github-script/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Automate GitHub by using GitHub Script

lessons.title: Manage software delivery by using a release based workflow on GitHub
lessons.content_md:
Learn to implement a release based workflow on GitHub using project boards, branches, and releases.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/release-based-workflow-github/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage software delivery by using a release based workflow on GitHub

lessons.title: Build continuous integration workflows by using GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create workflows to add continuous integration (CI) to your projects.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-ci/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build continuous integration workflows by using GitHub Actions

lessons.title: Build and deploy applications to Azure by using GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
Create two deployment workflows using GitHub Actions and Microsoft Azure. Learn about triggering a CD workflow and storing credentials.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/github-actions-cd/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Build and deploy applications to Azure by using GitHub Actions

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Manage source control
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Manage source control**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
